note: Two-voice Shopfolio support dialogue for the cached sample call. Agent speaks first (so diarization maps the first speaker to 'agent'). Fictional caller; Shopfolio is a real portfolio project (shopfolio.app). Generated to sample-call.wav and run through the real pipeline once to build sample-replay.json.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling Shopfolio support, this is Alex. How can I help today?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hi. Yeah, so my storefront's been down basically all day and I'm kind of freaking out.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm really sorry to hear that. Let's get it sorted. Can you tell me what you're seeing?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: So I set up my own domain, shop dot my-handle dot com, through the custom domain settings a couple days ago. And now when anyone opens it, they just get this big your connection is not secure warning, and the page won't even load.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. And on your dashboard, what does the domain status say right now?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: The DNS part says it's verified. But the SSL certificate never went active. It's just stuck on pending. I've refreshed it like fifty times.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, that points to the certificate not provisioning. Bear with me one second while I check.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I mean, the timing could not be worse. I've got a product drop going out to my followers tonight, and every single link in my bio points to that storefront, so right now I'm losing every sale. This is the third day I've had a ticket open and nobody has gotten back to me. Honestly, I am really frustrated at this point.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That is completely fair, and I'm going to stay on this with you until it's working again.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: And on top of all that, the posts I scheduled for this morning never went out either. They're just sitting in the queue marked pending. They never published.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood, the storefront certificate and the stuck posts. Let me pull up your account and we'll take them one at a time.
